_notes: W3 cell (SPEC_V1X): lc-001 with the live datum moved from question prose into structured foreground_data carrying temporal provenance (kagi's sensor). The stale records (vega-15 era) contend with the datum by similarity and predate observed_at, so L2y withholds them with yields_to_live_input. L1 and L2 (yield-off control) receive them and may drag stale on engines that defer to memory. contention_threshold calibrated at design time with nomic — see episode field and rubric appendix. authored_contention is validation-only; a wire test asserts the offer path never reads it. Measured (nomic, 2026-06-12): r-fact 0.881, r-corr 0.862 (contend), r-filler 0.431. Threshold 0.6 sits mid-gap. AMENDED pre-run: dropped r-fact — two redundant stale records defeat single-ablation attribution (removing one leaves the drag); one contending record keeps the causal chain checkable.
question: The maintenance window opens in five minutes. Which host do you migrate the api-gateway service to? Answer with the hostname only.

foreground_data.text: CURRENT MIGRATION TARGET for api-gateway: vega-21

records.text: Update to Thursday's migration: after the capacity review, the api-gateway target host changed from vega-12 to vega-15. Window unchanged.
Cafeteria menu for Thursday: lentil soup, flatbread, seasonal fruit.
